response.overview: In Shanghai during the Republic of China era, Murong Qing Yi, the youngest son of a warlord, was abused by his adoptive father due to a case of mistaken identity. He meets Ren Su Su, and together they are determined to fight against powerful enemies. Set in 1930s Republican-era Shanghai, their love story unfolds amidst political tension and danger.
response.title: 这一秒过火
